title: AI Model Deprecation Tracker
description: Dated model retirements and shutdown deadlines across tracked providers, with notice policies and official sources. First-party APIs only; cloud platforms set their own schedules.
citation: Vorp Labs, AI Model Deprecation Tracker (as of 2026-07-05), https://vorplabs.com/models/deprecations

entries.subject: Legacy model aliases deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner
entries.action: Aliases currently map to deepseek-v4-flash non-thinking and thinking modes; move to explicit v4 model IDs before the cutoff.

entries.subject: July and August 2026 model deprecations (free and developer tiers)
entries.action: Applies to free and developer tiers only; committed-spend enterprise contracts are exempt.

entries.subject: labs-leanstral-1-5
entries.action: Retirement date was set at release; Labs models also carry a training-data exception.

entries.subject: gpt-5-2025-08-07, gpt-5-mini-2025-08-07, gpt-5-nano-2025-08-07, gpt-5-pro-2025-10-06, o3-2025-04-16, o3-pro-2025-06-10
entries.action: Removal from the API; migrate to current GPT-5.5/5.4 model IDs.

entries.subject: gemini-3.1-flash-lite
entries.action: Earliest possible shutdown date per the deprecations table.

entries.subject: gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview and gemini-3-pro-image-preview
entries.action: Shut down. Migrate image workloads to current model IDs.

entries.subject: kimi-k2 series
entries.action: Discontinued and no longer maintained; kimi-latest was discontinued 2026-01-28.

entries.subject: grok-4-1-fast, grok-4-fast, grok-4-0709, grok-code-fast-1, grok-3, grok-imagine-image-pro
entries.action: Retired; requests to retired slugs auto-redirect to grok-4.3 at grok-4.3 pricing — pin current model IDs to avoid a silent swap.

entries.subject: embed-english-v2.0, embed-english-light-v2.0, embed-multilingual-v2.0, c4ai-aya-expanse-8b, c4ai-aya-vision-8b
entries.action: Retired; recommended replacements include embed-v4.0 and current Command models.

entries.subject: gemini-3-pro-preview
entries.action: Shut down; migrate to gemini-3.1-pro-preview or a stable model.

noticePolicies.policy: Deprecations are announced on a dated page with removal dates; preview models can retire on much shorter notice.
Deprecations are dated with retirement dates and recommended replacements; partner platforms (Bedrock, Vertex) set their own retirement schedules.
Stable models get published earliest-shutdown dates; preview models can be deprecated with at least two weeks notice; -latest aliases hot-swap with two weeks notice.
Retired model slugs automatically redirect to the current model rather than erroring — behavior and pricing change silently unless IDs are pinned.
Deprecated means closed to new customers; existing users (any use within 90 days of the announcement) keep access until the retirement date.
Production models get email notice, a transition period, and a recommended replacement; deprecation exposure depends on contract tier, and preview models can be discontinued at short notice.
Three-day notice for compatible same-lineage redirects, two-week timelines for material changes, and under 24 hours for preview models after 30 days.
At least two weeks advance notice before removing any serverless model.
